violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer by the blade sharpener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be washed rinsed and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

At the time of inspection, the Food contact surfaces of the can opener and deli slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. (Equipment was taken out of service for proper wash/rinse/sanitize procedures at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

The Pizza Prep Unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Water (Condensate) is pooling in the base of the unit. Per the PIC, currently trying to unclog the drain tubing for the condensate line. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

Milk Crates (Moldy at the time of inspection) are used as shelving in the walk-in cooler. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Milk Crates were disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
